creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191164
Patch to add GOCACHE=off to GO_ENV

Starting with Go 1.10, the "go build" command maintains a compiler cache which is activated by default.
As a result, all poudriere builds result in errors since root/.cache is changed during build and contains these results.

Attached patch adds GOCACHE=off to the build flags to prevent this problem. May I commit this?
